title: satureja tomentosa
intro: Satureja tomentosa, also known as woolly savory, is a perennial herb belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Satureja tomentosa include its ability to soothe digestive issues, alleviate respiratory problems, and provide relief from pain and inflammation. Satureja tomentosa is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and essential oils, and can be consumed in various forms, including capsules and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties.
